occupation_definition: Diagnose and treat mental and emotional disorders, whether cognitive, affective, or behavioral, within the context of marriage and family systems. Apply psychotherapeutic and family systems theories and techniques in the delivery of services to individuals, couples, and families for the purpose of treating such diagnosed nervous and mental disorders. Excludes “Psychologists” (19-3032 through 19-3039) and “Social Workers” (21-1020).

breadcrumb.occupation_title: Counselors, Social Workers, and Other Community and Social Service Specialists

siblings.occupation_title: Substance Abuse and Behavioral Disorder Counselors
Educational, Guidance, and Career Counselors and Advisors
